name: cursor-usage

cursorUsage.pollInterval.description: How often to refresh usage data (in minutes)

cursorUsage.minimalMode.description: Show only the active metric: premium requests if not exhausted, or credits if premium is used up

enumDescriptions: Current billing cycle (falls back to Last 30 Days when reset metadata is unavailable)
cursorUsage.usageDuration.description: Time range for the usage-by-model breakdown in the tooltip. Current Billing Cycle falls back to Last 30 Days when reset metadata is unavailable.

cursorUsage.modelBreakdownSortBy.description: Sort column for the usage-by-model table.

cursorUsage.modelBreakdownSortOrder.description: Sort direction for the usage-by-model table.

cursorUsage.excludeZeroTokenModels.description: Hide rows in the usage-by-model table where token usage is zero.

cursorUsage.quotaAwareEventDisplay.description: In the dashboard, show included usage as requests and on-demand usage as spend instead of showing raw request and spend values for every event.

description: Fork of Cursor Usage: plan name, Ultra % (Total / First-party / API), and on-demand spend in the status bar.
author: tomippe

scripts.package: node esbuild.config.mjs --production && mkdir -p build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --out "build/cursor-usage-${VERSION}.vsix"
scripts.package:vsm: node esbuild.config.mjs --production && node scripts/prepare-vsm-package.mjs && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && cd "build/vsm-package" && npx --yes @vscode/vsce package --out "../cursor-usage-tomippe-${VERSION}.vsix"
scripts.publish:vsm: npm run package:vsm && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && npx --yes @vscode/vsce publish --packagePath "build/cursor-usage-tomippe-${VERSION}.vsix" -p "$VSCE_PAT"
